message:
fix: correct 7 errors found during review

1. Remove SmartEdgar (private repo — visitors get 404)
2. Fix cargo install section (only xf is on crates.io)
3. Fix FrankenTUI description (BV/NTM are Go, not FrankenTUI)
4. Remove duplicate Phage Explorer from More Projects
5. Replace Swiss Army Llama with Your Source to Prompt in star history
6. Fix "designed by GPT-5" → "designed with frontier models"
7. Fix "289M lines" → "289M bytes" in languages.svg

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:

--- ## Products -- 📈 **[SmartEdgar](https://github.com/Dicklesworthstone/smartedgar)** — Modern SEC filing ingestion and research stack with an MCP server at its core - 🌐 **[jeffreyemanuel.com](https://www.jeffreyemanuel.com)** — Personal site built with Next.js 16, React Three Fiber, and GSAP. 70 components, 3D WebGL hero, 21 essays, 90+ project showcase. - 📝 **[JeffreysPrompts.com](https://jeffreysprompts.com)** — Battle-tested prompts for AI coding agents.
